title: workspace_action SSE Event
description: Asks the AI shell to perform a workspace-level action on behalf of the agent (navigate to a document, open a record, run a playbook, or dismiss a widget). Actions that mutate state require requiresConfirmation=true to trigger a HITL confirmation dialog.

actionId.description: Stable identifier for this action invocation. Used by the confirm endpoint to look up the pending action.

actionType.description: The class of action to perform.

label.description: Human-readable action label for display in confirmation dialogs and action panels.

parameters.description: Action-specific parameters. Shape depends on actionType.

requiresConfirmation.description: When true, the shell MUST show a HITL confirmation dialog before executing. When false, execute immediately.
